It is native to Australia and is often found in coastal and tropical regions. This plant is classified as a type of cycad palm, characterized by its narrow leaves and small white flowers. The classification of Coleospadix angustifolius is further supported by its unique growth habits and adaptations to its native environment. As a member of the Arecaceae family, Coleospadix angustifolius is closely related to other palm species found in Australia and around the world.
